Who I Am

About Me

Results-driven event professional with 3+ years of experience specialising in ground operations and event execution. Thrives in the thick of it — from setting up the venue and briefing the team to managing vendors on the fly and ensuring every moving part runs on time.


Known for strong on-ground presence, quick problem-solving, and hands-on coordination across artist hospitality, vendor management, guest flow, and live event logistics. The person who makes sure everything actually happens — not just on paper.
